feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.content: if you use their webchat, then you better hope you haven't given any personally identifying or sensitive information in any of your conversations because now it's going to be permanently frozen and plastered online in a big torrent you should consider: it is all stored in cleartext (this is also how they're able to scan for wrongdoings and moderate retroactively without you sharing chat details) and employees browse /g/ and regularly connect anonymous screenshots of chat logs to real users and s

entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8353 King Of The Manlets Edition Previous Thread: >>83837507 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise thei

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >"A man does something, it's 'strategic'; a woman does the same thing, it's 'cal…
entry.content: >"A man does something, it's 'strategic'; a woman does the same thing, it's 'calculated,'" Swift replied. english teacher taylor swift thinks "calculated" has a negative connotation >calculated - (of an action) done with full awareness of the likely consequences. I have never in my life perceived the word "calculated" to be negative. No one has ever thought "calculated" is the negative form of "strategic" is this bitch actually retarded? https://youtu.be/kQq6kJ6pOdI?t=8

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Fable 2
entry.content: Just wasted a few minutes of my life checking out the gameplay trailer for this game. And HOLY FUCK guys. One of the first fucking things I hear an NPC utter is: "I don't deal with randos" Writing style is so hilariously bad in this game I thought I was being pranked. Whichever redditor was in charge absolutely should not quit their day job. Find a new profession altogether while you're at it, writing is just not it. There is a genuine, concerning lack of vision here, and I'm sure that extends e

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: /TV/ IS DEAD
entry.content: just kill this bord. completely filled with forced meme spam, off topic, half the board <10 response trash thread. And most of that is samefagging. Mods did it with their constant nigger aids cancer, whether ‘obsession” or “eatshit/suckcock”, or neverending joker crust, baskinspam, obsessive compulsive trash. Zero organic OC or engagement anymore. Everyone from Svengoolie to Fishtank has left this cesspool. Just nuke /tv/. Nothing of value will be lost.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why the fuck do PC modders destroy perfectly good historical systems to make the…
entry.content: Why the fuck do PC modders destroy perfectly good historical systems to make them into shitty commodity PCs? I've also seen them do this to SGI and SPARC systems, pretty much any non-x86 system that's remotely attractive they'll gut and fuck up.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Does Linux have permanence?
entry.content: I can run modern Photoshop on fucking VISTA. Meanwhile, it seems like even a 3 year old Linux system suffers from forced obsolescence due to userspace ABI/API changes (glibc, gtk, mesa, etc) I have done my research and I am coming to the conclusion that Linux is a constantly sliding window and is inherently not meant for a reliable, unchanging desktop. Long-term software reliability is essentially impossible here unless you write everything yourself in portable C. What's the worth of your progra

entry.title: /news/ News: U.S. won’t renew USMCA, opening door for negotiations with Canada and Mexico
entry.content: https://www.cnbc.com/2026/0701/trum p-usmca-canada-mexico-trade-treaty. html The Trump administration has decided not to renew its trilateral trade pact with Canada and Mexico, instead opting to conduct annual reviews of the treaty that President Donald Trump once called “the best agreement we’ve ever made.” The widely anticipated decision on the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement, known as USMCA, was revealed Wednesday, the deadline for the three North American trade partners to determine wh

entry.title: /news/ News: Nearly half of Americans surveyed don't know what America 250 commemorates
entry.content: https://www.npr.org/2026/07/03/nx-s 1-5881451/cato-institute-250th-july -4th-constitution-declaration-of-in dependence-poll A new national poll reveals a striking paradox in public sentiment ahead of America's 250th anniversary: a disconnect between Americans' strong patriotic pride and their lack of civic knowledge. According to a survey from the libertarian Cato Institute think tank of more than 2,000 U.S. adults conducted in late June, 86% of respondents said they are grateful to be American

entry.title: /news/ News: Nord Stream blast ordered by Ukraine, say German prosecutors
entry.content: https://www.dw.com/en/nord-stream-b last-ordered-by-ukraine-say-german- prosecutors/a-77798230 Ukrainian state authorities were behind the 2022 sabotage of the Nord Stream gas pipelines linking Russia with Europe, German prosecutors said on Thursday. In a statement detailing the charges brought against suspect Serhii K. on Wednesday, prosecutors said that he and six accomplices had acted "on the orders of state authorities in Ukraine." According to prosecutors, K., now 50, was an "officer in the

entry.title: /news/ News: Louisiana Supreme Court grants stay of Attorney General Liz Murrill's indictment
entry.content: https://www.kotatv.com/2026/07/03/p reparations-trump-mount-rushmore-fi reworks-include-first-amendment-are a-protesters/ Louisiana Attorney General Liz Murrill filed an emergency request to the Louisiana State Supreme Court to cancel an arrest warrant and enforce a stay to her indictment. This comes hours after the court granted a stay of Attorney General Liz Murrill's indictment. The Court noted that the “Attorney General makes a compelling argument concerning the disturbing defects in the gra

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump announces pardons for pollution violators prosecuted for "fixing their car"
entry.content: https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump- announces-pardons-pollution-violato rs-fixing-their-car/ President Trump on Friday announced pardons for six people whom he said had been wrongfully prosecuted for "fixing their car" in what he called an act of "weaponization and stupidity" by federal prosecutors. "I AM SETTING THEM ALL FREE, RIGHT NOW!," Trump wrote in a post on Truth Social. The White House did not immediately provide a list of the names of the six defendants pardoned, but lawyer Stewart Cab
